column1: If I _________ more free time, I would go swimming every day.
It _____________ great if they opened a new gym round here, but it's not like to happen.
If I _______ fit, I __________ need to go to the gym.
The doctor says that if Lucy was really ill, he _______ give her some medicine.
Wouldn't it be better if you ________ on a diet.
You ________ need to go to the dentist if you didn't eat so many sweets.
The man said that he would tell me the time if he__________ a watch.
If it ________, we wouldn't go for a swim.
Perhaps you should get some exercise, then you __________ better.
_________ Pete help if we asked him?
